---
title: "Post Title"
author: "Paolo Bosetti"
date: "02/05/2025"
# date-modified: today
image: "image.jpg"
format: html
draft: true
categories: 
  - RTUG
  - milestone
abstract: >
  This is the abstract. If not empty, it is used in plece of the post initial paragraph to build the post preview in the posts listing.
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.align = "center",
  # This for default device
  out.width = "16cm",
  # This two for high quality charts:
  fig.dim = c(16, 9)*0.4
)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggforce)
library(adas.utils)
library(latex2exp)
```

```{r}
t <- c(A=0.05, B=0.03, C=0.3)
fp <- fp_design_matrix(2) %>% 
  fp_add_names(A="radius", B="length") %>% 
  fp_add_scale(A=c(0.25, 2), B=c(0.15, 6))

fpt <- fp %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    deltas = list(
      expand.grid(
        dA = c(-1, 1) * t[["A"]],
        dB = c(-1, 1) * t[["B"]]
      )
    ),
    .before = Y
  ) %>% 
  unnest(deltas) %>% 
  mutate(
    At = A + dA,
    Bt = B + dB,
    A_st = A_s * (1 + dA),
    B_st = B_s * (1 + dB),
    .before = Y
  )
fpt 

fpt %>% ggplot(aes(x=At, y=Bt)) + 
  geom_point() + 
  coord_equal()
```




```{r}
Vol <- function(r, l) pi * r^2 * l

fpt <- fpt %>%
  mutate(
    Y = Vol(A_st, B_st)
  )

fpt %>% arrange(Y)

fpt %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=At, y=Bt, color=Y)) + 
  geom_point() + 
  coord_equal() + 
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  labs(
    x = "A",
    y = "B",
    color = "Yield"
  )
```

```{r}
fpt_t <- fpt %>% 
  group_by(A, B) %>% 
  summarise(
    Ym=mean(Y), 
    Ys=sd(Y),
    SN = -10*log(sum((Y - Ym)^2 + (Ym - 4)^2) / n())
  ) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  right_join(fpt, by=c("A", "B"))

fpt_t %>% 
  ggplot() + 
  geom_point(aes(x=A, y=B, size=SN), alpha=0.1) +
  geom_point(aes(x=At, y=Bt, color=Y)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_b() +
  scale_color_viridis_b(option="A") +
  scale_size_continuous(range=c(1,50)) +
  coord_equal(xlim=c(-1.1, 1.1), ylim=c(-1.1,1.1)) + 
  guides(size="none") + 
  labs(title = TeX("$SN=-10 log(MSD)$"))
```
```{r}
fpt_t %>% 
  select(A, B, Ym, Ys, SN) %>% 
  mutate(across(c(Ym, Ys, SN), round, 2)) %>%
  distinct() %>% 
  knitr::kable(
    col.names = c("A", "B", "Mean Yield", "Yield Std. Dev.", "Signal-to-Noise Ratio")
  )
```





:::thatsall
That's all, folks!
:::
